zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Corbet于1280年11月1日出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特时，他的父亲Roger Corbet48岁，母亲Nesta Vale44岁。他于1306年与Mrs William Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他去世于1361年11月3日在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Corbet was born on 1 November 1280, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Corbet, was 48 and his mother, Nesta Vale, was 44. He married Mrs William Corbet in 1306, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 3 November 1361, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Corbet est né le 1 novembre 1280, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Corbet, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Nesta Vale, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Mrs William Corbet en 1306, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1361, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Corbet am 1. November 1280 in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Corbet 48 und seine Mutter Nesta Vale 44. Er hat 1306 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs William Corbet geheiratet. Er starb am 3. November 1361 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Corbet è nato il il 1 novembre 1280 nel Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Corbet, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Nesta Vale, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Mrs William Corbet nel 1306, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 3 novembre 1361, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Corbet(이)가 1280년 11월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Corbet(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Nesta Vale(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Mrs William Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1361년 11월 3일 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Corbet родился 1 ноября 1280 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Corbet было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Nesta Vale, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs William Corbet в 1306 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 3 ноября 1361 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.
